title: tetracera asiatica subsp. sumatrana
intro: Tetracera asiatica subsp. sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran Tetracera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine, and it is known for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are said to have various medicinal properties. The health benefits of Tetracera asiatica subsp. sumatrana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
